Settings.MenuHint: Image and audio settings for full-screen critical animations.
Settings.GMAvatarHint: Full-screen image used for NPC critical successes when the actor has no override.
Settings.PCCriticalSFXHint: Audio file played when a PC scores a Critical Success.
Settings.GMCriticalSFXHint: Audio file played when an NPC scores a Critical Success.
Settings.CinematicDurationHint: Total length of the snap-in / hold / snap-out animation. 600–3000ms.
Settings.TriggerModeHint: Choose what counts as a critical: the system's critical outcome (PF2e Critical Success / D&D 5e critical hit), or any natural 20 on the d20.
Settings.TriggerModeChoiceDnd5e: D&D 5e Critical Hit (attack crit; nat 20 on checks/saves)
Settings.EnableSkillCritsHint: Trigger cinematics on critical Skill Checks (PF2e) or natural-20 ability/skill/tool checks (D&D 5e).
Settings.EnablePerceptionCritsHint: Trigger cinematics on critical Perception checks (PF2e) or natural-20 Perception checks (D&D 5e).
Settings.AllowPlayerOptOutHint: When ON, each player can disable cinematics in their client settings.
Settings.ShowCinematicsHint: Display cinematic critical animations on this client.
Settings.AudioEnabledHint: Play critical SFX on this client.

Actor.EnableForNPCHint: GM-only. When OFF, this NPC never triggers a cinematic.
Actor.PortraitOverrideHint: Image shown full-screen for this actor's critical. Leave empty to use actor art (PC) or the NPC Default Image (NPC).
Actor.TestButtonHint: Play this cinematic locally. Not broadcast to other clients.
Actor.BroadcastButtonHint: GM-only. Play this cinematic on every connected client, including yourself.

Notifications.UnsupportedSystemWarning: GLUniverse Critical supports the PF2e and D&D 5e systems. Cinematics are disabled for this system.
Notifications.PortraitLoadFailed: Could not load image for cinematic.
Notifications.SFXLoadFailed: Could not load critical SFX audio file.
